title: Xtra Creamy Middle Eastern Peas Pilaf
description: A sweet and creamy solo dinner dish featuring peas, fried onions and a blend of Middle Eastern spices, cooked to perfection in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: Rinse the rice in a fine mesh sieve until the water runs clear, then drain and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and fry the onions until they are golden brown and crispy.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir for 1 minute.
Add the peas to the skillet and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Add the rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the peas and spice mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a bamboo steamer lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the coconut cream and lemon juice over the top of the rice mixture.
Steam the pilaf over boiling water for 20 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
